components.value: V the spell already requires, and doesn’t replace the verbal component. Spell-like abilities require this thought component , even though they normally don’t need spell . As usual with thought components , this addition increases the DC of any concentration checks the target attempts by 10 unless the target takes a move action to center his mind and satisfy the spell’s thought component . description.value: You create a mental block in the target’s mind, impeding the flow of his mental spellcasting process and forcing him to incorporate a thought component into any spell or spell-like ability he uses. This is in addition to any other
